title: Conjoined
description: Combine with other players as Siamese Twins or Triplets!
body:
This is a recreation of Dream's conjoined plugin, which combines 2 or 3 people into 1 player. This mod instead can conjoin up to 4 players, and soon there will be more.

Conjoined is mainly meant to be a challenge mod, and it is just a fun little gimmick to mess around with.

This is the first mod I ever made, and it is very old. I will be updating it more soon!

Showcase Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Giw7MC8STmg

Commands: 
/Twin_movement <player>
/Twin_interact <player>
/Twin_conjoin
/Twin_split

/Triplet_movement <player>
/Triplet_interact <player>
/Triplet_attack <player>
/Triplet_conjoin
/Triplet_split
